title: Far Away
description: An adventure-oriented modpack. This version still has some bugs, with low TPS caused by countered's settlement Roads.
body:
Embark on an endless journey of exploration! Far Away is a modpack centered around high-degree-of-freedom adventure, transforming Minecraft into an unknown world filled with mysterious structures and deadly challenges. You will traverse diverse biomes, delve into ancient dungeons, and confront epic monsters with meticulously crafted combat skills—every journey is a test of courage and wisdom.
Stay True：
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
Naturalist：
